title: CSVN
text: Home * Organizations * CSVN CSVN - Computer Schaak Vereniging Nederland, the Dutch Computer Chess Federation. Contents 1 History of the CSVN 2 Tournaments 3 Computerschaak 4 Board of the CSVN 4.1 2010 4.2 2012 4.3 2018 5 Forum Posts 6 External Links 7 References History of the CSVN [ edit ] The CSVN was founded in 1980 by ... Max Euwe Jan Louwman Jaap van Oosterwijk Bruyn [1] Jaap van den Herik ... and others [2] . First chairman was Jaap van Oosterwijk Bruyn . Tournaments [ edit ] The CSVN yearly organizes the Dutch Open Computer Chess Championship from 1981 to 2011 [3] , see Jan Louwman's announcement International CSVN Tournament from 2001 to 2013 CSVN Programmers Tournament since 2013 as well as users tournaments with dedicated units . Computerschaak [ edit ] The CSVN regularly publishes the Computerschaak Journal , two issues a year. Editor is Hans van der Zijden , who in October 2010 superseded Eric van Reem . Board of the CSVN [ edit ] 2010 [ edit ] The board of the CSVN in 2010: Cock de Gorter Chairman Kees Sio Treasurer Ries van Leeuwen Member administration Rienk Doetjes Secretary Non board functions: Hans van der Zijden Editor Computerschaak Jan Krabbenbos Webmaster 2012 [ edit ] The board of the CSVN from December 1st, 2012: Jan Krabbenbos Chairman Geert Roelof van der Ploeg Treasurer and member administration Richard Pijl Secretary Ruud Martin Member Hans Secelle Member Marcel van Kervinck Member 2018 [ edit ] Ruud Martin Chairman Jan Krabbenbos Temporary Treasurer Folkert van Heusden Secretary Non board functions: Hans van der Zijden Editor Computerschaak Jan Krabbenbos Webmaster Forum Posts [ edit ] An Open Letter to Cock de Gorter and the CSVN Board by Harvey Williamson , Hiarcs Forum , December 28, 2010 Rybka to play in Leiden? by Graham Banks , CCC , August 23, 2011 [4] Fwd: Open letter to the CSVN by Marcel van Kervinck , CCC , September 21, 2011, on behalf of Amir Ban , Don Dailey , Robert Hyatt , Gerd Isenberg , Marcel van Kervinck , Stefan Meyer-Kahlen , Fabien Letouzey , Thomas Mayer , Daniel Mehrmann , Gian-Carlo Pascutto , Richard Pijl , Ralf Schäfer , Mark Uniacke , Ben-Hur Carlos Vieira Langoni Júnior , Harvey Williamson  » ICGA Investigations - Aftermath Computer chess on a suicide mission by Rebel , Rybka Forum , September 22, 2011 An idea to save the CSVN tournament by Jeroen , Rybka Forum , September 30, 2011 Re: how far is too far: houdini for sell? by Marcel van Kervinck , CCC , October 12, 2011 Open letter to chess programmers by Richard Pijl , CCC , May 11, 2013 CSVN Autumn Tournament by Richard Pijl , CCC , September 23, 2013 External Links [ edit ] CSVN Computerschaak Home Old CSVN Site CSVN Supplement Site (Dutch) Alle pagina's Computerschaken, Schaken References [ edit ] ↑ Frans Morsch and Van Oosterwijk Bruyn , DOCCC 1986 , Computerschaak pagina 3 (Dutch) ↑ Computerschaak pagina 1 (Dutch) Redactie: J. ten Have and Drs.
